question: WHY SHOULD THE BALL MOVE THE SWING AND NOT ME?
content: GRAVITY AND INERTIA WILL GUARANTEE YOUR SWING IS EXACTLY THE SAME OVER AND OVER AGAIN. ON THE OTHER HAND, IF IT IS YOU MOVING THE ARM, YOUR STRENGTH AND ENERGY WILL BE RESPONSIBLE TO REPEAT EXACTLY THE SAME MOVEMENT, AND WHEN THE ENERGY GOES DOWN, THAT WONT BE AS EASY.
